requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (JSMO technical regulation + JS / IEC 60335-2-24, 230 V / 50 Hz)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（JSMO技术法规 + JS / IEC 60335-2-24，230 V / 50 Hz）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（JSMO技術法規 + JS / IEC 60335-2-24，230 V / 50 Hz）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Jordanian market must meet the electrical safety requirements set out in the applicable Jordanian Standard (JS), which is adopted from the IEC 60335 series — specifically IEC 60335-1 (general requirements) together with IEC 60335-2-24 (particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers). The Jordan Standards and Metrology Organization (JSMO) is the national body that adopts JS standards (largely based on IEC and GSO standards) and enforces the mandatory technical regulation under which a conformity certificate is required for regulated electrical products. Appliances must be rated and verified for Jordan's electricity supply of 230 V, 50 Hz single-phase. Key requirements mirror the IEC 60335-2-24 content: protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, thermal cut-outs, creepage and clearance distances, mechanical strength of the enclosure, earthing continuity, and appliance markings in line with the standard. Conformity is demonstrated through test reports and the JSMO conformity certificate route used at import.
summary.zh: 投放约旦市场的家用制冷器具须满足适用约旦标准（JS）中规定的电气安全要求，该标准采纳自IEC 60335系列——即IEC 60335-1（通用要求）与IEC 60335-2-24（制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求）。约旦标准与计量组织（JSMO）是采纳JS标准（主要基于IEC和GSO标准）的国家机构，并执行强制技术法规，受管制电器产品须据此取得符合性证书。器具须按约旦230 V、50 Hz单相供电进行额定标定与验证。核心要求与IEC 60335-2-24内容一致：防触电保护、绝缘电阻与介电强度、热断路器、爬电距离与电气间隙、外壳机械强度、接地连续性及符合标准的器具标识。符合性通过检测报告及进口环节使用的JSMO符合性证书路径证明。
summary.zht: 投放約旦市場的家用製冷器具須滿足適用約旦標準（JS）中規定的電氣安全要求，該標準採納自IEC 60335系列——即IEC 60335-1（通用要求）與IEC 60335-2-24（製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求）。約旦標準與計量組織（JSMO）是採納JS標準（主要基於IEC和GSO標準）的國家機構，並執行強制技術法規，受管制電器產品須據此取得符合性證書。器具須按約旦230 V、50 Hz單相供電進行額定標定與驗證。核心要求與IEC 60335-2-24內容一致：防觸電保護、絕緣電阻與介電強度、熱斷路器、爬電距離與電氣間隙、外殼機械強度、接地連續性及符合標準的器具標識。符合性透過檢測報告及進口環節使用的JSMO符合性證書路徑證明。

standards_or_laws: JS / IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (Jordanian Standard adopted from IEC 60335-2-24)
JS / IEC 60335-1 — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)
JSMO mandatory technical regulation for regulated electrical products — conformity certificate required at import
Jordan grid rating: 230 V, 50 Hz single-phase

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with Chinese national deviations, read with GB 4706.1-2005 (general requirements). GB 4706.13 is mandatory and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated body before sale in China. Chinese appliances are typically rated for 220 V, 50 Hz. CCC test reports issued by Chinese laboratories against GB 4706.13 are not directly accepted by JSMO as the basis for a Jordanian conformity certificate, although both China and Jordan ultimately trace to IEC 60335-2-24, which can reduce re-testing scope.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010并含中国国家偏差，须与GB 4706.1-2005（通用要求）结合使用。GB 4706.13为强制性标准，由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度执行；产品须经CNCA指定机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。中国器具通常按220 V、50 Hz额定。中国实验室依据GB 4706.13出具的CCC检测报告不被JSMO直接接受为约旦符合性证书的依据，尽管中约最终均追溯至IEC 60335-2-24，这可缩减重新检测范围。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010並含中國國家偏差，須與GB 4706.1-2005（通用要求）結合使用。GB 4706.13為強制性標準，由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度執行；產品須經CNCA指定機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。中國器具通常按220 V、50 Hz額定。中國實驗室依據GB 4706.13出具的CCC檢測報告不被JSMO直接接受為約旦符合性證書的依據，儘管中約最終均追溯至IEC 60335-2-24，這可縮減重新檢測範圍。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Because both regimes derive from IEC 60335-2-24, the underlying engineering content is broadly aligned, but procedural and ratings gaps remain: (1) JSMO requires a conformity certificate issued against the Jordanian technical regulation for import clearance — a CCC certificate is not directly accepted, so test reports must be presented to (or re-issued through) a JSMO-recognised conformity assessment route. An IECEE CB Scheme test report based on IEC 60335-2-24 (issued by an IECEE NCB) can typically reduce or avoid duplicate testing — exporters should confirm acceptance with the importer and JSMO. (2) Voltage rating — appliances must be rated and marked for 230 V (Jordan) rather than 220 V (China); the 50 Hz frequency is common to both, but rating-plate markings, thermal behaviour at 230 V, and any voltage-dependent protective components should be verified. (3) Documentation — product markings and instructions should be available in Arabic for the Jordanian market, and the importer named for conformity follow-up.
gap.zh: 由于两套制度均源自IEC 60335-2-24，底层工程内容大体一致，但程序与额定值差距仍存：（1）JSMO要求进口通关须取得依据约旦技术法规签发的符合性证书——CCC证书不被直接接受，故须将检测报告通过JSMO认可的合格评定路径提交（或重新签发）。基于IEC 60335-2-24的IECEE CB体系检测报告（由IECEE NCB签发）通常可缩减或避免重复检测——出口商应与进口商及JSMO确认接受度。（2）电压额定——器具须按230 V（约旦）而非220 V（中国）额定并标识；50 Hz频率两者相同，但铭牌标识、230 V下的热行为及任何与电压相关的保护元件应予核实。（3）文件——产品标识与说明书宜提供阿拉伯语版本以适应约旦市场，并注明负责符合性跟进的进口商。
gap.zht: 由於兩套制度均源自IEC 60335-2-24，底層工程內容大體一致，但程序與額定值差距仍存：（1）JSMO要求進口通關須取得依據約旦技術法規簽發的符合性證書——CCC證書不被直接接受，故須將檢測報告通過JSMO認可的合格評定路徑提交（或重新簽發）。基於IEC 60335-2-24的IECEE CB體系檢測報告（由IECEE NCB簽發）通常可縮減或避免重複檢測——出口商應與進口商及JSMO確認接受度。（2）電壓額定——器具須按230 V（約旦）而非220 V（中國）額定並標識；50 Hz頻率兩者相同，但銘牌標識、230 V下的熱行為及任何與電壓相關的保護元件應予核實。（3）文件——產品標識與說明書宜提供阿拉伯語版本以適應約旦市場，並註明負責符合性跟進的進口商。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — JSMO conformity certificate required before customs clearance and market placement; JS / IEC 60335-2-24 is the applicable adopted safety standard; appliances must be rated for 230 V / 50 Hz
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety for household refrigerating appliances entering Jordan is governed by JS standards adopting IEC 60335-2-24, enforced via the JSMO conformity certificate at import. Chinese CCC certification to GB 4706.13 is not directly accepted, but because both trace to IEC 60335-2-24, an IECEE CB report can reduce re-testing. Appliances must be rated for 230 V / 50 Hz — verify the voltage rating versus China's 220 V.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入约旦的家用制冷器具电气安全依据采纳IEC 60335-2-24的JS标准管理，并在进口环节通过JSMO符合性证书执行。中国依据GB 4706.13的CCC认证不被直接接受，但因两者均追溯至IEC 60335-2-24，IECEE CB报告可缩减重新检测。器具须按230 V / 50 Hz额定——须核实电压额定与中国220 V的差异。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入約旦的家用製冷器具電氣安全依據採納IEC 60335-2-24的JS標準管理，並在進口環節通過JSMO符合性證書執行。中國依據GB 4706.13的CCC認證不被直接接受，但因兩者均追溯至IEC 60335-2-24，IECEE CB報告可縮減重新檢測。器具須按230 V / 50 Hz額定——須核實電壓額定與中國220 V的差異。
